summary: Although the role provides the predictable schedule and remote options you seek, the core cognitive demands directly conflict with your professional strengths and preferences. The position requires advanced quantitative analysis and independent strategic judgment, moving significantly beyond the procedural, protocol-driven tasks where you excel. Given the zero-margin-for-error regulatory environment and high legal liability, the mismatch in thinking style would likely lead to unsustainable levels of stress that would quickly negate any benefits of the steady hours.
